# yPosition: ----
# approachID: 2023.03.23-09.17.55-00060
# force-settings.type: segmented-force-settings
# force-settings.global-settings.control-settings-type: segment-control-settings
# force-settings.global-settings.closed-loop: true
# force-settings.global-settings.start-option.type: continue
# force-settings.global-settings.pixel-clock.active: false
# force-settings.global-settings.pixel-clock.name: 
# force-settings.global-settings.ttl-outputs.pins.list:
